phases.title: Phase 1: Foundational Framework - Command Line, OS, and Networking

labs.title: Linux Fundamentals (Parts 1-3)
labs.realWorldApp: Corporate server pe bina GUI ke navigate karna. EDR ko alert kiye bina sensitive config files aur SSH keys dhundhne ke liye ye commands bahut zaroori hain.

labs.title: Bash Scripting
labs.realWorldApp: External pen-test mein hazaron IPs manually check karna impossible hai. Custom tool banakar network scan aur vulnerable targets ko text file mein output karne ke liye ye use hota hai.

labs.title: Advent of Cyber (Linux CLI)
labs.realWorldApp: Web server access logs analyze karte waqt base64 encoded payloads decode karne aur attacker ki methodology samajhne ke liye.

labs.title: Network Fundamentals
labs.realWorldApp: Internal network mein ghusne ke baad segmentation samajhna. Active Directory Domain Controllers kis subnet mein hain, ye identify karne mein madad karta hai.

labs.title: Nmap
labs.realWorldApp: Bug bounty mein public infrastructure par external footprinting karke exposed aur unpatched services (jaise purana SMB ya Apache server) dhundhna.

labs.title: How The Web Works
labs.realWorldApp: Burp Suite jaise proxy ke through web traffic intercept karke session cookies manipulate karna. Auth bypass vulnerabilities identify karne ka fundamental step.

phases.title: Phase 2: Blue Teaming and Security Operations

labs.title: SOC Level 1 Path
labs.realWorldApp: Corporate SOC mein employees dwara report kiye gaye phishing emails ko triage karna. Email headers analyze karke sandbox mein malicious attachments execute karna.

labs.title: Network Traffic Analysis
labs.realWorldApp: Snort rules likhkar network traffic mein anomalies detect karna. Agar attacker DNS packets ke through data chura raha hai, toh rules apply karke us traffic ko block karna.

labs.title: SIEM Triage for SOC
labs.realWorldApp: Lateral movement detect karna. Analyst alag computers ke Windows Event Logs correlate karke attacker ka timeline reconstruct karta hai ki intrusion kahan se shuru hua.

labs.title: Malware Concepts for SOC
labs.realWorldApp: Jab naya ransomware variant network pe attack karta hai, tab security team uske signature aur behavior ko analyze karti hai taaki wo aur na phaile.

phases.title: Phase 3: Primary Track - Offensive Security, Web Exploitation, and Bug Bounty

labs.title: Information Gathering
labs.realWorldApp: Main website attack karne se pehle attack surface expand karna. Forgotten dev subdomains bina authentication ke dhundhna aur system mein entry lena.

labs.title: Cross-site Scripting (XSS)
labs.realWorldApp: E-commerce customer support system mein malicious JS inject karna. Admin ticket open karega aur script admin ke session cookies chura legi ya rogue admin account bana degi.

labs.title: SQL Injection (SQLi - MySQL)
labs.realWorldApp: Unsanitized input field ka fayda utha ke customer database dump karna. Hashed passwords aur PII extract karna, ya database ke through server pe web shell likhna.

labs.title: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)
labs.realWorldApp: Vulnerable PDF generation endpoint ke through cloud metadata service (169.254.169.254) se temporary IAM credentials extract karna, jo internal cloud infra tak access de dega.

labs.title: Command Injection
labs.realWorldApp: Corporate router ke web interface mein malicious Linux commands append karke reverse shell gain karna aur direct OS control lena.

labs.title: Login Brute Forcing
labs.realWorldApp: Target organization ke employees par targeted dictionary attack karna. Social engineering data se custom lists banakar corporate VPN portals pe credential stuffing perform karna.

labs.title: Server Side Template Injection (SSTI)
labs.realWorldApp: Modern web frameworks ke templating engines ka misuse karke RCE execute karna, jisse company ka database aur internal network compromise ho jaye.

phases.title: Phase 4: Advanced Red Teaming and Active Directory Exploitation

labs.title: Initial Access
labs.realWorldApp: Highly targeted spear-phishing campaign design karna jo MFA ko bypass kare. AiTM frameworks use karke session tokens churana aur employee inbox access karna.

labs.title: Post Compromise & Privilege Escalation
labs.realWorldApp: Receptionist workstation par foothold milne ke baad Living off the Land tools se local credentials harvest karna aur memory dumps extract karke internal servers ki taraf badhna.

labs.title: Active Directory Exploitation
labs.realWorldApp: Kerberoasting, Pass-the-Hash, ya Golden Ticket attacks karke standard user se Domain Administrator tak privilege escalate karna, jisse pure network par control mil sake.

labs.title: Evasion & C2
labs.realWorldApp: Target network mein long-term, stealthy persistence banaye rakhna. C2 traffic ko regular HTTPS ya DNS traffic jaisa dikha kar obfuscate karna taaki Blue Team ke tools dhokha kha jayein.
